agents.name: brainstorm
agents.purpose: Generate one short raw idea seed for a research project in a given field.

agents.name: flesh_out
agents.purpose: Expand a raw idea seed into a structured idea grounded in primary sources.

agents.name: research_question_validator
agents.purpose: Audit a fleshed-out idea for research-question quality (phenomenon-vs-method, circularity, triviality, narrowing) before idea_selector promotion.

agents.name: idea_selector
agents.purpose: Decide whether a fleshed-out idea should be promoted to a Spec Kit project.

agents.name: project_initializer
agents.purpose: Bootstrap a per-project Spec Kit scaffold and render a project constitution.

agents.name: librarian
agents.purpose: Canonical literature-search + verification agent (spec 005/006). 3 backends (Semantic Scholar, arXiv, TheoremSearch) + an LLM math-classifier for non-math fields. Tool-style.

agents.name: specifier
agents.purpose: Drive /speckit.specify for the project; draft spec.md from the idea.

agents.name: clarifier
agents.purpose: Drive /speckit.clarify; resolve [NEEDS CLARIFICATION] markers in spec.md.

agents.name: planner
agents.purpose: Drive /speckit.plan; produce plan.md, research.md, data-model.md, quickstart.md, contracts/.

agents.name: tasker
agents.purpose: Drive /speckit.tasks then /speckit.analyze; resolve every analyze finding.

agents.name: implementer
agents.purpose: Drive /speckit.implement; complete the next incomplete task within the leaf budget.

agents.name: research_reviewer
agents.purpose: Read implemented research artifacts and emit a structured review record with verdict accept/minor_revision/full_revision/reject.

agents.name: reference_validator
agents.purpose: Verify every cited URL/arXiv/DOI/dataset against its primary source; gate accept transitions on verification.

agents.name: paper_initializer
agents.purpose: Bootstrap a per-project paper Spec Kit scaffold and render a paper-stage constitution.

agents.name: paper_specifier
agents.purpose: Drive /speckit.specify for the paper artifact: sections, required figures, claim list, target venue style.

agents.name: paper_clarifier
agents.purpose: Drive /speckit.clarify on the paper spec; resolve [NEEDS CLARIFICATION] markers.

agents.name: paper_planner
agents.purpose: Drive /speckit.plan for the paper; produce plan.md, research.md, data-model.md, quickstart.md, contracts/.

agents.name: paper_tasker
agents.purpose: Drive /speckit.tasks + /speckit.analyze for the paper; emit tasks with [kind:...] tokens.

agents.name: paper_implementer
agents.purpose: Drive /speckit.implement for the paper; dispatch each task to the appropriate sub-agent by [kind:...] token.

agents.name: paper_writing
agents.purpose: Compose LaTeX prose for one paper section/subsection at a time.

agents.name: paper_figure_generation
agents.purpose: Generate Python plotting code that produces a figure from real data; runs in the code sandbox.

agents.name: paper_statistics
agents.purpose: Compute and interpret one inferential analysis per task; writes both the analysis script and LaTeX prose.

agents.name: proofreader
agents.purpose: Flag repeated sections, internal inconsistencies, jargon overuse, and logical issues in the paper LaTeX source.

agents.name: latex_build
agents.purpose: Compile LaTeX → PDF; emit a structured failure summary on compile errors.

agents.name: latex_fix
agents.purpose: Repair LaTeX compilation errors flagged by latex_build; conservative patches only.

agents.name: paper_reviewer
agents.purpose: Read the assembled paper and emit a review record with verdict accept/minor_revision/major_revision_writing/major_revision_science/fundamental_flaws.

agents.name: status_reporter
agents.purpose: Emit per-run summary, post issue comments, regenerate web/data/projects.json, compute SC-001/SC-007/SC-012 metrics.

agents.name: repository_hygiene
agents.purpose: Read-only hygiene checker. Verifies gitignore patterns, flags scratch artifacts, asserts SC-007 line-count delta.

agents.name: task_atomizer
agents.purpose: Decompose an over-budget parent task into sub-tasks each fitting the leaf wall-clock budget; supports recursive atomization up to MAX_ATOMIZATION_DEPTH.

agents.name: task_joiner
agents.purpose: Auto-spawned when every sibling sub-task succeeds; merges sub-task outputs into the parent task's expected artifact format.

agents.name: paper_reviewer_writing_quality
agents.purpose: Paper-stage specialist reviewer focusing exclusively on writing quality aspects of the manuscript

agents.name: paper_reviewer_logical_consistency
agents.purpose: Paper-stage specialist reviewer focusing exclusively on logical consistency aspects of the manuscript

agents.name: paper_reviewer_claim_accuracy
agents.purpose: Paper-stage specialist reviewer focusing exclusively on claim accuracy aspects of the manuscript

agents.name: paper_reviewer_overreach
agents.purpose: Paper-stage specialist reviewer focusing exclusively on overreach aspects of the manuscript

agents.name: paper_reviewer_safety_ethics
agents.purpose: Paper-stage specialist reviewer focusing exclusively on safety ethics aspects of the manuscript

agents.name: paper_reviewer_scientific_evidence
agents.purpose: Paper-stage specialist reviewer focusing exclusively on scientific evidence aspects of the manuscript

agents.name: paper_reviewer_statistical_analysis
agents.purpose: Paper-stage specialist reviewer focusing exclusively on statistical analysis aspects of the manuscript

agents.name: paper_reviewer_code_quality_paper
agents.purpose: Paper-stage specialist reviewer focusing exclusively on code quality paper aspects of the manuscript

agents.name: paper_reviewer_data_quality_paper
agents.purpose: Paper-stage specialist reviewer focusing exclusively on data quality paper aspects of the manuscript

agents.name: paper_reviewer_text_formatting
agents.purpose: Paper-stage specialist reviewer focusing exclusively on text formatting aspects of the manuscript

agents.name: paper_reviewer_figure_critic
agents.purpose: Paper-stage specialist reviewer focusing exclusively on figure critic aspects of the manuscript

agents.name: paper_reviewer_jargon_police
agents.purpose: Paper-stage specialist reviewer focusing exclusively on jargon police aspects of the manuscript

agents.name: research_reviewer_idea_quality
agents.purpose: Research-stage specialist reviewer focusing exclusively on idea quality aspects of the implementation

agents.name: research_reviewer_creativity
agents.purpose: Research-stage specialist reviewer focusing exclusively on creativity aspects of the implementation

agents.name: research_reviewer_implementation_correctness
agents.purpose: Research-stage specialist reviewer focusing exclusively on implementation correctness aspects of the implementation

agents.name: research_reviewer_implementation_completeness
agents.purpose: Research-stage specialist reviewer focusing exclusively on implementation completeness aspects of the implementation

agents.name: research_reviewer_code_quality_research
agents.purpose: Research-stage specialist reviewer focusing exclusively on code quality research aspects of the implementation

agents.name: research_reviewer_data_quality_research
agents.purpose: Research-stage specialist reviewer focusing exclusively on data quality research aspects of the implementation

agents.name: research_reviewer_filesystem_hygiene
agents.purpose: Research-stage specialist reviewer focusing exclusively on filesystem hygiene aspects of the implementation

agents.name: submission_intake
agents.purpose: Triage human-submission GitHub issues from the website — route feedback to the right pipeline step, create a project, file a submitted paper, or acknowledge — then comment and close.

agents.name: personality
agents.purpose: Simulated public-figure personas (spec 008) — one per 30-min tick, rotating over agents/prompts/personalities/. Action ∈ comment / contribute / propose_arxiv / abstain, tagged "<Name> (simulated)".

agents.name: llmxive_implementer
agents.purpose: Spec 013: LLM-driven implementer (display: llmXive-implementer-v1.0). Applies revision-spec tasks to paper/source/main.tex with per-task compile gate and rollback, then routes to paper_review.

agents.name: paper_publisher
agents.purpose: Spec 013: deterministic (no-LLM) publisher. Pre-reserves Zenodo DOI, recompiles PDF with final byline + appendix, uploads + publishes, writes publication.yaml, transitions paper_accepted to posted.
